chunks.text: One night, I opened an old family album.
Many familiar pictures appeared one by one.
In the center of a picture, there is a girl playing the piano.
It is my sister when she was small.
“ Is that girl playing the piano really me?
There is also a boy running on a wide field.
That is my brother a few years ago.
My brother running with such energy looks much smaller than now.
“ This is a letter written by your grandfather,” my mother told me.
The letter is old, but the color of the ink is still clear.
At the entrance, there is a picture painted by an old friend.
Its soft colors warm my heart each time I see it.
The boy laughing in the park with a balloon in his hand is Tom.
His bright eyes have not changed at all.
Each picture holds a quiet story inside.
